gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor bends slightly forward, smiles widely, and gestures toward the colorful blocks while inviting attention.
a person moves both hands outward in a welcoming gesture while envisioning three groups of blocks.
a tutor stands tall, raises their arms to demonstrate a neat array while explaining the concept of three times three.
a person nods enthusiastically, then draws imaginary rows in the air with their right hand, illustrating three rows.
a tutor claps their hands together and gestures to the learners, encouraging them to start drawing their own arrays.
a person counts on their fingers while happily shifting weight from side to side, reinforcing the counting of blocks.
a tutor raises both arms high in celebration while praising the learners for their work on multiplication.
a person gestures with their hands to show adding groups while smiling, reinforcing the concept of three groups of three.
